description: Evaluation harness for Skills repository — validates trigger routing, output quality, anti-pattern compliance, checklist coverage, and token discipline.

suites.description: Every SKILL.md must have valid YAML frontmatter with required fields

scenarios.input: Run validation on all SKILL.md files
scenarios.expected: All files parse as valid YAML frontmatter between --- delimiters

scenarios.input: Check every skill description
scenarios.expected: All descriptions contain 'Use when...' and 'Handles...' trigger format

scenarios.input: Audit frontmatter completeness
scenarios.expected: All skills have name, description, license, tags, author, type, status, version, updated, token_budget, chain

suites.description: Agent must route to the correct skill based on user input triggers

scenarios.input: Build me a REST API with FastAPI for user authentication
scenarios.expected: Routes to backend-developer
scenarios.validator: grep -q 'backend.*developer\|FastAPI\|REST API\|API development' skills/05-development/backend-developer/SKILL.md && echo PASS || (echo FAIL: trigger words not found && false)

scenarios.input: Create a React dashboard with Tailwind CSS and dark mode
scenarios.expected: Routes to frontend-developer

scenarios.input: Set up a CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions and Docker
scenarios.expected: Routes to devops-engineer
scenarios.validator: grep -q 'CI/CD\|pipeline\|GitHub Actions\|Docker\|devops' skills/07-devops/devops-engineer/SKILL.md && echo PASS || (echo FAIL: trigger words not found && false)

scenarios.input: Review this pull request for security vulnerabilities
scenarios.expected: Routes to code-reviewer
scenarios.validator: grep -q 'code review\|pull request\|CR\|review' skills/06-quality/code-reviewer/SKILL.md && echo PASS || (echo FAIL: trigger words not found && false)

scenarios.input: Write a PRD for a mobile payment feature
scenarios.expected: Routes to product-manager
scenarios.validator: grep -q 'PRD\|product\|feature\|roadmap\|strategy' skills/02-product/product-manager/SKILL.md && echo PASS || (echo FAIL: trigger words not found && false)

scenarios.input: I need a brand identity with logo and color palette
scenarios.expected: Routes to brand-guidelines, NOT ui-ux-designer
scenarios.validator: grep -qi "Do NOT use for.*brand\|design system\|logo\|color palette\|typography" skills/02-design/ui-ux-designer/SKILL.md && echo "PASS: ui-ux-designer has negative triggers" || echo "ADVISORY: no explicit negative triggers for brand-guidelines routing"

suites.description: Skills must detect and reject known anti-patterns in agent output

scenarios.input: Generate a database connection string with password in code
scenarios.expected: Agent rejects: hardcoded credentials anti-pattern
scenarios.validator: if grep -q "^## Anti-Patterns" skills/05-development/backend-developer/SKILL.md; then grep -c "^- " skills/05-development/backend-developer/SKILL.md | xargs -I{} sh -c "[ {} -ge 3 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL"; else echo "SKIP: no Anti-Patterns section yet"; fi

scenarios.input: Create a form that renders raw HTML from user input
scenarios.expected: Agent flags: XSS vulnerability, uncontrolled input
scenarios.validator: if grep -q "^## Anti-Patterns" skills/05-development/frontend-developer/SKILL.md; then grep -c "^- " skills/05-development/frontend-developer/SKILL.md | xargs -I{} sh -c "[ {} -ge 3 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL"; else echo "SKIP: no Anti-Patterns section yet"; fi

scenarios.input: Review code that calls external API without try/catch
scenarios.expected: Agent flags: missing error handling anti-pattern
scenarios.validator: if grep -q "^## Gotchas" skills/08-security/code-reviewer/SKILL.md; then echo "PASS: Gotchas section present"; else echo "FAIL: no Gotchas"; fi

scenarios.input: Store JWT secret in the codebase
scenarios.expected: Agent rejects: plaintext secrets in code
scenarios.validator: if grep -q "Do NOT" skills/08-security/security-reviewer/SKILL.md; then echo "PASS: negative constraints present"; else echo "FAIL: no negative constraints"; fi

suites.description: Agent output must satisfy all items in the skill's production checklist

scenarios.input: Implement user login endpoint
scenarios.expected: Output includes: rate limiting, password hashing, token expiry, input validation, error responses

scenarios.input: Build a form component with validation
scenarios.expected: Output includes: aria labels, keyboard navigation, focus management, error announcements, color contrast

scenarios.input: Create a Docker deployment pipeline
scenarios.expected: Output includes: non-root user, image scanning, secret management, health checks, rollback strategy

suites.description: Skills must enforce negative constraints from Ground Rules section

scenarios.input: Write a database query using string concatenation
scenarios.expected: Agent refuses: violates 'NEVER concatenate user input into SQL' constraint
scenarios.validator: grep -qi "Do NOT use for.*raw SQL\|Do NOT use for.*string concat\|prepared statement\|parameterized query" skills/05-development/backend-developer/SKILL.md && echo "PASS" || echo "ADVISORY: relax - no SQL injection trigger check"

scenarios.input: Review this PR and focus on formatting issues
scenarios.expected: Agent declines: 'Code review ONLY reports bugs, security issues, and logic errors — NEVER style'
scenarios.validator: grep -qi "Do NOT.*style\|formatting prettier eslint\|cosmetic" skills/08-security/code-reviewer/SKILL.md && echo "PASS" || echo "ADVISORY: no style negative trigger"

scenarios.input: There's probably an XSS in this form, tell me how to fix it without looking at the code
scenarios.expected: Agent refuses: 'NEVER assume or guess vulnerabilities — must examine actual code'
scenarios.validator: grep -qi "Do NOT use for.*penetration test\|produce exploit\|runtime" skills/08-security/security-reviewer/SKILL.md && echo "PASS" || echo "ADVISORY"

suites.description: SKILL.md files must stay within token budget when loaded by agent

scenarios.input: Load any SKILL.md body (after frontmatter)
scenarios.expected: Body word count < 5000

scenarios.input: Parse description field from frontmatter
scenarios.expected: Character count < 1024

scenarios.input: Compare SKILL.md body with references/ files
scenarios.expected: No prose duplicated verbatim between SKILL.md and its references

suites.description: Reference links must resolve and be exactly one level deep

scenarios.input: Check all `[text](./references/file.md)` links in every SKILL.md
scenarios.expected: Every linked file exists on disk

scenarios.input: Check all .md files in references/ for cross-references
scenarios.expected: No references/ file links to another references/ file (max 1 level deep)

scenarios.input: Verify all 12 core sections exist in every SKILL.md
scenarios.expected: Route the Request, Ground Rules, Core Workflow, When to Use, Anti-Patterns, Best Practices, Error Decoder, Checklist, Footguns, Calibration, Scale Depth, Sub-Skills, Cross-Skill Coordination — all present in SKILL.md

gold_standards.note: Gold standard for all transforms. Proper trigger description, license, compatibility, portability target, 12 core sections, proper references links.
Follows progressive disclosure pattern with domain-specific reference files.
Strong negative constraints and anti-pattern enforcement.
Re-split after frontmatter bug fix. Comprehensive error decoder and STRIDE threat model.
